titleStmt.title: SII 4.672: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 672. (A.R. No. 222 of 1892). See Ep. Ind., Vol. VI, p. 275, No. 3. ON ANOTHER PILLAR IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
¿ hāratuṣāraśaṁkhavimalābhramahçōjvalakī¨rttiṁ jālaṁ bō
lpārina buddamaṁḍaliku nagrasutuṁḍagu manmamaṁḍa(ṁ)ḍā . cāra
paruṁḍu nādeṁḍlaṁ jārutaraṁbagu veṁḍikoṁḍanāṁ gauriśaśā
ṁkkamauliki vigu¨rvvunatō guḍi nilpe bhaktunanu [. 1*] gaḍiyamadēvi na
ṁddanuṁ ḍasamaguṇākāradha¨rmmaśīluṁ ḍippuḍami veluṁgu no
ṁceḍlapūṁḍi mahēśuna kiṁdumaulikiṁ . gaḍu nanurāgacittamu
naṁ galgi nijaṁ bagucuṁḍa nicce nījaḍanidhuluṁ divākaruṁḍu ja
ṁdruṁḍunuṁ galayaṁttagālamunu [. 2*] mēruguṇāvatāruṁḍa
gu mēḍanikiṁ galuhāragandhi Aṁbhōruhanētri Anvayavi
bhūṣaṇi nāṁdagu mēḍamāṁbakunu(ṁ) . gāravalīla buṭṭi gu
ṇagauravasaṁppada vistarilli gāndhāriki sītakunśacikiṁ dā nadhi
kaṁ bani brastutiṁppaṁgānu [. 3*] varaśakavatsaraṁbu luḍuvalla
bhata¨rkkakhēṁdusaṁkhyagāṁ baragi veluṁgu māghasitapaṁccami
yuṁ gavivāsaramunaṁ . durutarakī¨rttilōluṁ ḍana noppi
na buddaṁdripālukāṁtta dā narudugucuṁḍa nādiṁḍlaAṁdu
vrasiddiga śūlapāṇikini [. 4*] vyālēbhaca¨rmmadhāriki mū
lasthānaṁbu nādimū¨rttiki śrīkāpāliki mṛḍunaku haru
naku nīlagrīvunaku nīśuniki numapatikini [. 5*] stiramati gaḍiya
madēvulu diramai yuṁḍaṁga nakhaṁḍadīpamu nilpeṁ . daratara monna
tamuga nī kharakarajalajāritārakamuga dharitrini [. 6*]
yī dīpaṁbuna kiccina goṟiyalu 55 . vīniṁ jēkoni manya gomma
ya koḍku prōlayabōyuṁḍu Āṁcaṁdrā¨rkkamuṁ butrānupautri
kamu nitya māneṁḍu neyi diviyakuṁ bōyaṁgalavāṁḍu . cīramu
gadēvadēvunaku śrībalidēvara dēvi śaṁkhulābharaṇamu gītavā
dyamulu baṭṭuna cīralu dhūpaghaṁṭayuṁ . diramagu ghaṁ ṭavari
yalamu dīpanikāyamu dhēnusaṁghamu nnaruduga manumama
ṁḍaṁḍu vriyaṁbonaranu raciyiṁcce bhaktitōnu [. 7*] Atisayamaina ccha
tramunu naddamu nullamu nālavaṭṭamunu jitamaguṁ jā
marāvaliyu jīṁḍlacayaṁbuluṁ gētanaṁbulu . nnatulamahçō
kṣavāhanuna kadrijanātuna kiṁddumaivuli kāyatamaṇi ma
nmamaṁḍaṁḍu jayāsphaduṁ ḍoppaṁga nicce bhaktu tōnu [. 8*] noṁcinipā
ḍu gōrukonna kolcudēvaraku vīsa viḍuvaṁgalavāru .
Digital edition of SII 4.672 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
